description: The EHS (Environment, Health, and Safety) manager is conducting a safety audit of a manufacturing plant.

nodes.task_description: Review the plant's safety records and past incidents.

expected_outcome.value: EHS manager reviews the safety logs for the past year.

nodes.task_description: Conduct a physical walkthrough of the plant using a safety checklist.

expected_outcome.value: Manager inspects the facility and documents any potential hazards (e.g., blocked fire exits, unlabeled chemicals).

nodes.task_description: Create a corrective action plan based on the audit findings and assign owners for each item.

expected_outcome.value: Manager creates a report with required actions and assigns them to the plant manager.
